The most […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Waymo’s robotaxis stalled, snarled traffic, and drove into fireworks on July 4 https://thenextweb.com/news/waymo-july4-firework-gridlock-robotaxi-meltdown Tue, 07 Jul 2026 18:39:41 +0000 TheNextWeb=2fa5a804ad50e369c16fd8ca33a40900 Waymo’s robotaxis had a rough Fourth of July. Over the holiday weekend, driverless Waymo cars became the story instead of the technology.
